name: Greylock
description_short: Greylock Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union serving Berkshire County, MA and Columbia County, NY with lending, savings, and financial coaching services.
description_long:
Greylock Federal Credit Union is a federally chartered, member-focused credit union operating in Massachusetts and New York with a routing number 211885250. The organization has been serving the Pittsfield, MA and Hudson, NY communities with locations throughout Berkshire and Columbia counties. As a not-for-profit, member-owned institution, Greylock emphasizes community engagement and financial empowerment as core mission elements.

Greylock offers a comprehensive suite of consumer and business financial products. On the lending side, they provide auto loans (advertised from 5.29% APR), home loans including first-time homebuyer programs with $3,000 bonuses, personal loans, recreational vehicle loans, student loans, green loans, and Quick Cash loans (approved in under 60 seconds with no credit check). Deposit products include checking accounts with debit cards, savings accounts, money market accounts, term share certificates, and individual retirement accounts. They also offer business checking, business credit cards, business savings products, and business loans. Payment and access services include digital banking, telephone banking, shared branching, Zelle transfers, Video Teller Services at ATMs, and eDocuments.

Greylock distinguishes itself through community-focused programming and financial education initiatives. The credit union operates a Community Empowerment Center offering free financial coaching and classes, maintains a Money Mindset Blog, and administers a Community Enrichment Scholarship for high school students. They offer specialized programs including Wealth Builders accounts for ages 0-22, Quality Time Club for members 55+, and educational partnerships like Banzai financial literacy teaching. The organization explicitly emphasizes diversity, equity, and inclusion with their "Opportunity Grows Here" branding and maintains dedicated investment and insurance services through Greylock Investment Group and Greylock Insurance Agency.

Greylock is well-suited for consumers seeking member-owned financial services with community investment and education components. The Quick Cash loan option and Video Teller Services provide convenient access. However, as a credit union with physical locations primarily in two counties, geographic reach is limited compared to national banks. The website does not provide detailed rate comparisons, term lengths, or loan approval requirements, which may require direct contact for specific product details.
services: Home loans and mortgages including first-time homebuyer programs
Quick Cash loans (no credit check, under 60 seconds)
Business loans and business loan services
Credit cards and business credit cards
Money market accounts and term share certificates
Digital banking and mobile wallet access
Investment services through Greylock Investment Group
Insurance services through Greylock Insurance Agency
pros: Quick Cash loans approved in under 60 seconds with no credit check required
First-time homebuyer program offering $3,000 bonus and pre-approval services
Auto loans advertised as low as 5.29% APR
Mass Save HEAT Loan program offering 0% interest financing for energy-efficient upgrades
Video Teller Services providing 24/7 ATM access with live teller support and up to $2,500 cash withdrawals
Free financial coaching and classes through Community Empowerment Center
Member-owned not-for-profit structure with reinvestment in community programs
Comprehensive digital banking available 24/7 with eDocuments portal
cons: Geographic limitations with physical locations only in Berkshire County, MA and Columbia County, NY
Website lacks specific APR ranges, loan terms, and eligibility requirements for most products
Quick Cash loans require no credit check (may indicate higher rates or smaller loan amounts)
Limited information on business loan terms, SBA offerings, or equipment financing specifics
No published rates for savings accounts, money market accounts, or certificate products
best_for: Residents of Berkshire County, MA and Columbia County, NY seeking member-owned banking
First-time homebuyers in the service area looking for down payment assistance
Community-minded consumers prioritizing financial education and local reinvestment
Individuals needing quick emergency cash loans without credit checks
diagnosis: Greylock Federal Credit Union is best for residents of Berkshire County, MA or Columbia County, NY who prioritize member ownership, community reinvestment, and financial education alongside standard banking services. The primary limitation is geographic availability—this credit union does not serve customers outside its two-county footprint, making it unsuitable for those outside Massachusetts and New York service areas.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
